qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: Refer to the given -address code sequence. This code sequence is split into basic blocks. The number of basic blocks is ________. (Answer in integer) 1001: i = 1 1002: j = 1 1003: t1 = 10*i 1004: t2 = t1+j 1005: t3 = 8*t2 1006: t4 = t3-88 1007: a[t4] = 0.0 1008: j = j+1 1009: if j <= 10 goto 1003 10
